MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JENNIFER C. ADDAMS, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, 415.703.5382, FOR RESPONDENT JOHN D. WAGNER, DIRECTOR, DEPARTMENT OF SOCIAL SERVICES, STATE OF CALIFORNIA; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT WILL LIGHTBOURNE'S Motion To Dismiss IS Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss;
Off Calendar Mar-22-2013 Continued To Apr-08-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT WILL LIGHTBOURNE 's Motion To Dismiss is continued on the court's own motion to April 8, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party must deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 22, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
